hero.subtitle: A completely self-hosted, REST-based, typo-tolerant full-text search engine written in Go. Drop it into any tech stack and supercharge your search in minutes.

demo.title: Live Playground
demo.subtitle: Test the engine hitting a real local instance. Generate demo data and type below!

setup.title: 1. Dataset Setup
setup.subtitle: Populate the search engine with sample data to test queries locally.

status.success: Success! {{name}} index is ready. Try searching.
status.error_connection: Error: Cannot connect to Koskidex at {{url}}. Is it running?

setup.preview_subtitle: Here are some examples of what you can search for now:

search.placeholder: Search for movies or products... (Try a typo!)
search.load_dataset: Load a dataset above to start searching.

integration.title: Integrate in seconds
integration.subtitle: Pure REST. No heavy client limits. Speaks JSON to any language.

docs.title: Technical Documentation
docs.subtitle: Complete guide to integrating Koskidex into your ecosystem.

go.title: Go (Native)
go.desc: Koskidex is written in Go. You can compile it as a static binary or use it as a library in your Go project.
go.port_desc: Default API port is {{port}}. Ensure your firewall allows traffic on this port.

php.title: PHP / Laravel
php.desc: Integrate Koskidex into Laravel or any PHP project using Composer. Dedicated support for Eloquent models and automatic synchronization.
php.laravel_trait_desc: Effortless integration for your Eloquent models. Just add the trait and configure the mapping.
php.sync_desc: The PHP SDK automatically synchronizes your models with Koskidex every time you perform a save(), update() or delete(). No complex worker setup needed.
php.config_desc: Configure your connections and model mappings in `config/koskidex.php`. You can specify which fields to index and set relevance thresholds.

js.title: JavaScript / Node.js
js.desc: Flexible client for Node.js and Browser environments. Ideal for real-time search UIs and automated indexing pipelines.

architecture.title: Architecture & Concepts
architecture.desc: Understand how Koskidex works under the hood to get the most out of your search engine.

concepts.indices_desc: An index is a collection of similar documents. Each index can have its own settings, synonyms, and ranking rules.
concepts.documents_desc: Documents are JSON objects. Koskidex is schemaless, but every document must have a unique 'id' field.
concepts.search_desc: Search is powered by an inverted index and a custom ranking pipeline that considers typo distance (Damerau-Levenshtein) and field frequency.

customization.title: CSS & Customization
customization.desc: The Koskidex UI is designed to be fully themeable. You can override our CSS utility classes to match your brand.
customization.classes_desc: Every component exposes predictable class names like `koskidex-result-item`, `koskidex-search-input`, and `koskidex-highlight`.

search_status.offline_desc: Cannot connect to the search service at {{url}}.

error.something_wrong: Something went wrong in the search engine UI. Don't worry, it's not you, it's us.
